<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins\Parallel\Handlers; use Pest\Plugins\Concerns\HandleArguments; use Pest\Plugins\Parallel\Contracts\HandlersWorkerArguments; final class Pest implements HandlersWorkerArguments { use HandleArguments; /** * Handles the arguments, adding the "PEST_PARALLEL" environment variable to the global $_SERVER. */ public function handleWorkerArguments(array $arguments): array { $_SERVER['PEST_PARALLEL'] = '1'; return $arguments; } }
